attachments.text: By <https://www.blrtools.com/blog/import-apple-mac-emails-to-outlook/|converting Apple Mail emails to Outlook>, users can connect their Apple Mail accounts to Microsoft Outlook. Outlook does not natively accept MBOX files, nevertheless, Apple Mail emails do. MBOX files must be converted to the Outlook PST format by users. attachments.text:
Here’s a simple and clear guide on how to merge multiple PST files into one PST file using trusted software like BitRecover PST Merge Tool:

Download and install the software.

Open the software and click “open” to load your PST files.

Choose “Select Files” or “Select Folder” to add multiple PST files.

Select “Merge into One PST” to combine all data into a single file.
